content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence of non-negative integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​. A pair (x,y)(x, y)(x,y), where 1≤x<y≤N1 \le x \lt y \le N1≤x<y≤N, is an inversion if Ax>AyA_x \gt A_yAx​>Ay​.

You should answer QQQ queries (numbered 111 through QQQ). For each valid iii, in the iii-th query:


You are given a non-negative integer KiK_iKi​.
Consider a sequence B1,B2,…,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1​,B2​,…,BN​, where Bj=Aj⊕KB_j = A_j \oplus KBj​=Aj​⊕K for each valid jjj.
You should find the number of inversions in the sequence BBB.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 555
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
each of the next QQQ lines describes a query with a single integer KiK_iKi​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print QQQ lines. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines should contain a single integer ― the answer to the iii-th query.
